summary: Comprehensive testing of SQL Import, Customer Edit, and Warranty Invoice features for MuscleGrid CRM. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified via UI testing.

issues: Minor: Console warning about missing Description for DialogContent - not blocking functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from this iteration have been thoroughly tested and verified. SQL import brought in 329 tickets with legacy_id field populated and proper phone deduplication (241 unique phones mapped to unique customer_ids). Customer Edit feature allows admin to modify all customer fields except phone (which is the unique ID). Warranty Invoice feature shows View/Upload options in the Approved warranties tab.

sql_import.phone_deduplication: PASS - 241 unique phones, each maps to single customer_id

customer_edit.ticket_data_sync: PASS - Ticket records also updated when customer is edited
customer_edit.phone_readonly: PASS - Phone field is read-only with explanation text
customer_edit.edit_button_visible: PASS - Edit button appears on ticket detail page
customer_edit.edit_dialog_fields: PASS - First Name, Last Name, Email, Address, City, State, Pincode

warranty_invoice.invoice_column_visible: PASS - Visible on Approved warranties tab
warranty_invoice.view_link_working: PASS - View links present for warranties with invoices
warranty_invoice.upload_button_working: PASS - Upload button opens dialog for warranties without invoices
warranty_invoice.upload_dialog_fields: PASS - Customer info, Order ID, Device, Warranty Expires, File input
warranty_invoice.upload_api_working: PASS - Invoice upload endpoint returns success
